notes: Full menu captured including pizzas, shareables, salads, sandwiches, entrees, and desserts. Salads offered in multiple sizes with tiered pricing. No beverage/cocktail list present in raw text; beverages array is empty. Two items flagged as seasonal.

dishes.name: Piccola Verde
